title: Google TPU 8t and 8i is here..
summary: Google released TPU 8t and 8i, specialized ASICs for training and inference respectively. The 8i is served via Virgo Network, a high-throughput network infrastructure. The video compares these with NVIDIA GPUs and examines scaling strategies that impact token economics and LLM serving costs.
